steps.title: Fastest path: mark the relationships first
steps.content: Mark the given angle relationships first: equal angles, vertical angles, supplementary angles, parallel-line angles, and triangle sums of $180^\circ$. Most of these questions become a short angle chase once the givens are marked.

steps.title: Write the obtuse angle
steps.content: An acute angle and an adjacent obtuse angle formed by a transversal are supplementary. If the acute angle is $(9x-620)^\circ$, then each obtuse angle is $$180-(9x-620)=800-9x.$$

steps.title: Add one acute and three obtuse angles
Match the given form
steps.content: The sum is given as $(-18x+w)^\circ$, so $w=1780$. The answer is 1780.
